---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or scan rule for Anubis
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Use Case
Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the workflow you want to improve.

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Which Module?
- [ ] 🐺 Jackal (scan/clean)
- [ ] 𓂓 Ka (ghost detection)
- [ ] 🛡️ Guard (RAM management)
- [ ] 👁️ Sight (Spotlight/Launch Services)
- [ ] 🌊 Hapi (resource optimization)
- [ ] 🪲 Scarab (fleet/network)
- [ ] ⚖️ Scales (policy engine)
- [ ] 📋 Profile (configuration)
- [ ] 🧠 Brain (neural/AI)
- [ ] 🔌 MCP (IDE integration)
- [ ] 📜 New scan rule

## If New Scan Rule
- **Target application/framework:**
- **Paths to scan:**
- **Category:** (general / dev / ai / vms / ides / cloud / storage)
- **Platform:** (macOS / Linux / cross-platform)

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

## Additional Context
Screenshots, links, or examples.
